info.name: Data Connector — Imports & Purchases
info.description:
Test the data-connector import/purchase RRA flow: fetch from RRA (sync) → list pending → approve/reject → poll job status. Async endpoints return 202 + jobId; poll Jobs > Get Job Status.

Set collection variables first (baseUrl, tinNumber, bhfId, branchId, businessId, taxServerUrl). After a sync or list, copy a real variantId / purchaseId into the variables, then run approve/reject. Job-producing requests auto-save the returned jobId into the {{jobId}} variable.

exec: if (j && j.jobId) { pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId', j.jobId); console.log('jobId =', j.jobId); }

request.description: Reads last import date cursor (or now on first run), calls RRA imports/selectImportItems, stores items as pending (imptItemSttsCd='2') in Supabase + Ditto, and advances import_purchase_dates.
Returns { branchId, count, imports: [variant + nested stock] }.
Default flipper inbox set: impt_item_stts_cd='2' OR (='3' AND dcl_no IS NOT NULL).

exec: if (j && j.jobId) { pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId', j.jobId); console.log('jobId =', j.jobId); }

request.description: No targetVariantId → generates itemCd, runs RRA saveItems→saveStockItems(06)→saveStockMaster→updateImportItems, writes new variant + stock to Supabase + Ditto.

exec: if (j && j.jobId) { pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId', j.jobId); console.log('jobId =', j.jobId); }

request.description: With targetVariantId → updateImportItems, then adds incoming qty to the existing variant's stock via saveStockItems(06)+saveStockMaster; updates target stock/variant in Supabase + Ditto.

exec: if (j && j.jobId) { pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId', j.jobId); console.log('jobId =', j.jobId); }

request.description: Sets imptItemSttsCd='4', calls RRA updateImportItems, updates variant in Supabase only (no Ditto / no stock change).

exec: if (j && j.jobId) { pm.collectionVariables.set('jobId', j.jobId); console.log('jobId =', j.jobId); }

request.description: Reads last purchase date cursor, calls RRA trnsPurchase/selectTrnsPurchaseSales, dedupes by (branch, spplrTin, spplrInvcNo), stores purchases + variants as pending (pchsSttsCd='01') in Supabase + Ditto, advances the cursor.
Returns { branchId, count, purchases: [{ purchase, variants:[...] }] }.
